_meta.description: Mean and std of violent_per_1k and property_per_1k crime rates by area type.
sources: Empirical: NYC Open Data NYPD complaints 2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01 (13 neighborhoods)
Empirical: LA Open Data LAPD incidents 2023-12-01 to 2024-12-01 (4 neighborhoods)
National reference: FBI UCR 2022 Crime in the U.S. summary tables (suburban/exurban/rural)
notes: violent_per_1k: (assault + robbery + homicide) per 1,000 residents in scored radius
property_per_1k: (burglary + theft + vehicle theft) per 1,000 residents in scored radius
Baselines intentionally use a moderately wide std to avoid penalizing genuinely urban areas vs national rural norms
Rebuild with scripts/baselines/build_community_safety_baselines.py as more data accumulates
